zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Fitzgerald於1365年出生在愛爾蘭時，她的父親Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond21歲，母親Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond15歲。她於1398年2月27日與Maurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1403年享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Fitzgerald于1365年出生在爱尔兰时，她的父亲Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond21岁，母亲Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond15岁。她于1398年2月27日与Maurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1403年享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Fitzgerald was born in 1365, in Ireland, her father, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, was 21 and her mother, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, was 15. She married Maurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw on 27 February 1398, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1403, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Fitzgerald est née en 1365, à Irlande, son père, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Maurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw le 27 février 1398, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1403, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Fitzgerald 1365 in Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond 21 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond 15. Sie hat am 27. Februar 1398 in Irland Maurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1403 im Alter von 38 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Fitzgerald è nata il nel 1365 nel Irlanda, sua padre, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Maurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw il 27 febbraio 1398, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1403, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzgeraldが1365年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmondは21歳，母Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmondは15歳であった。1398年2月27日にアイルランドでMaurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnawと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1403年に38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzgerald(이)가 1365년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1398년 2월 27일 아일랜드에서 Maurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Fitzgerald nasceu em 1365, em Irlanda, seu pai, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Maurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw em 27 de fevereiro de 1398, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1403, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Fitzgerald родилась в 1365 г. в местности Ирландия, её отцу по имени Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw 27 февраля 1398 г. в местности Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1403 г. в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Fitzgerald nació en 1365, en Irlanda, su papá, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Maurice FitzJohn FitzMaurice 6th Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw el 27 de febrero de 1398, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1403, a la edad de 38 años.
